verses.4: Tanzeelan mimman khalaqa alarda waalssamawati alAAula
verses.6: Lahu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi wama baynahuma wama tahta alththara
verses.7: Wain tajhar bialqawli fainnahu yaAAlamu alssirra waakhfa
verses.8: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa lahu alasmao alhusna
verses.10: Ith raa naran faqala liahlihi omkuthoo innee anastu naran laAAallee ateekum minha biqabasin aw ajidu AAala alnnari hudan
verses.12: Innee ana rabbuka faikhlaAA naAAlayka innaka bialwadi almuqaddasi tuwan
verses.14: Innanee ana Allahu la ilaha illa ana faoAAbudnee waaqimi alssalata lithikree
verses.15: Inna alssaAAata atiyatun akadu okhfeeha litujza kullu nafsin bima tasAAa
verses.16: Fala yasuddannaka AAanha man la yuminu biha waittabaAAa hawahu fatarda
verses.18: Qala hiya AAasaya atawakkao AAalayha waahushshu biha AAala ghanamee waliya feeha maaribu okhra
verses.21: Qala khuthha wala takhaf sanuAAeeduha seerataha aloola
verses.22: Waodmum yadaka ila janahika takhruj baydaa min ghayri sooin ayatan okhra
verses.36: Qala qad ooteeta sulaka ya moosa
verses.38: Ith awhayna ila ommika ma yooha
verses.39: Ani iqthifeehi fee alttabooti faiqthifeehi fee alyammi falyulqihi alyammu bialssahili yakhuthhu AAaduwwun lee waAAaduwwun lahu waalqaytu AAalayka mahabbatan minnee walitusnaAAa AAala AAaynee
verses.40: Ith tamshee okhtuka fataqoolu hal adullukum AAala man yakfuluhu farajaAAnaka ila ommika kay taqarra AAaynuha wala tahzana waqatalta nafsan fanajjaynaka mina alghammi wafatannaka futoonan falabithta sineena fee ahli madyana thumma jita AAala qadarin ya moosa
verses.42: Ithhab anta waakhooka biayatee wala taniya fee thikree
verses.44: Faqoola lahu qawlan layyinan laAAallahu yatathakkaru aw yakhsha
verses.45: Qala rabbana innana nakhafu an yafruta AAalayna aw an yatgha
verses.46: Qala la takhafa innanee maAAakuma asmaAAu waara
verses.47: Fatiyahu faqoola inna rasoola rabbika faarsil maAAana banee israeela wala tuAAaththibhum qad jinaka biayatin min rabbika waalssalamu AAala mani ittabaAAa alhuda
verses.48: Inna qad oohiya ilayna anna alAAathaba AAala man kaththaba watawalla
verses.50: Qala rabbuna allathee aAAta kulla shayin khalqahu thumma hada
verses.52: Qala AAilmuha AAinda rabbee fee kitabin la yadillu rabbee wala yansa
verses.53: Allathee jaAAala lakumu alarda mahdan wasalaka lakum feeha subulan waanzala mina alssamai maan faakhrajna bihi azwajan min nabatin shatta
verses.54: Kuloo wairAAaw anAAamakum inna fee thalika laayatin liolee alnnuha
verses.55: Minha khalaqnakum wafeeha nuAAeedukum waminha nukhrijukum taratan okhra
verses.56: Walaqad araynahu ayatina kullaha fakaththaba waaba
verses.57: Qala ajitana litukhrijana min ardina bisihrika ya moosa
verses.58: Falanatiyannaka bisihrin mithlihi faijAAal baynana wabaynaka mawAAidan la nukhlifuhu nahnu wala anta makanan suwan
verses.59: Qala mawAAidukum yawmu alzzeenati waan yuhshara alnnasu duhan
verses.60: Fatawalla firAAawnu fajamaAAa kaydahu thumma ata
verses.61: Qala lahum moosa waylakum la taftaroo AAala Allahi kathiban fayushitakum biAAathabin waqad khaba mani iftara
verses.63: Qaloo in hathani lasahirani yureedani an yukhrijakum min ardikum bisihrihima wayathhaba bitareeqatikumu almuthla
verses.64: FaajmiAAoo kaydakum thumma itoo saffan waqad aflaha alyawma mani istaAAla
verses.65: Qaloo ya moosa imma an tulqiya waimma an nakoona awwala man alqa
verses.66: Qala bal alqoo faitha hibaluhum waAAisiyyuhum yukhayyalu ilayhi min sihrihim annaha tasAAa
verses.68: Qulna la takhaf innaka anta alaAAla
verses.69: Waalqi ma fee yameenika talqaf ma sanaAAoo innama sanaAAoo kaydu sahirin wala yuflihu alssahiru haythu ata
verses.70: Faolqiya alssaharatu sujjadan qaloo amanna birabbi haroona wamoosa
verses.71: Qala amantum lahu qabla an athana lakum innahu lakabeerukumu allathee AAallamakumu alssihra falaoqattiAAanna aydiyakum waarjulakum min khilafin walaosallibannakum fee juthooAAi alnnakhli walataAAlamunna ayyuna ashaddu AAathaban waabqa
verses.72: Qaloo lan nuthiraka AAala ma jaana mina albayyinati waallathee fatarana faiqdi ma anta qadin innama taqdee hathihi alhayata alddunya
verses.73: Inna amanna birabbina liyaghfira lana khatayana wama akrahtana AAalayhi mina alssihri waAllahu khayrun waabqa
verses.74: Innahu man yati rabbahu mujriman fainna lahu jahannama la yamootu feeha wala yahya
verses.75: Waman yatihi muminan qad AAamila alssalihati faolaika lahumu alddarajatu alAAula
verses.76: Jannatu AAadnin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha wathalika jazao man tazakka
verses.77: Walaqad awhayna ila moosa an asri biAAibadee faidrib lahum tareeqan fee albahri yabasan la takhafu darakan wala takhsha
verses.78: FaatbaAAahum firAAawnu bijunoodihi faghashiyahum mina alyammi ma ghashiyahum
verses.80: Ya banee israeela qad anjaynakum min AAaduwwikum wawaAAadnakum janiba alttoori alaymana wanazzalna AAalaykumu almanna waalssalwa
verses.81: Kuloo min tayyibati ma razaqnakum wala tatghaw feehi fayahilla AAalaykum ghadabee waman yahlil AAalayhi ghadabee faqad hawa
verses.82: Wainnee laghaffarun liman taba waamana waAAamila salihan thumma ihtada
verses.83: Wama aAAjalaka AAan qawmika ya moosa
verses.84: Qala hum olai AAala atharee waAAajiltu ilayka rabbi litarda
verses.85: Qala fainna qad fatanna qawmaka min baAAdika waadallahumu alssamiriyyu
verses.86: FarajaAAa moosa ila qawmihi ghadbana asifan qala ya qawmi alam yaAAidkum rabbukum waAAdan hasanan afatala AAalaykumu alAAahdu am aradtum an yahilla AAalaykum ghadabun min rabbikum faakhlaftum mawAAidee
verses.87: Qaloo ma akhlafna mawAAidaka bimalkina walakinna hummilna awzaran min zeenati alqawmi faqathafnaha fakathalika alqa alssamiriyyu
verses.88: Faakhraja lahum AAijlan jasadan lahu khuwarun faqaloo hatha ilahukum wailahu moosa fanasiya
verses.89: Afala yarawna alla yarjiAAu ilayhim qawlan wala yamliku lahum darran wala nafAAan
verses.90: Walaqad qala lahum haroonu min qablu ya qawmi innama futintum bihi wainna rabbakumu alrrahmanu faittabiAAoonee waateeAAoo amree
verses.91: Qaloo lan nabraha AAalayhi AAakifeena hatta yarjiAAa ilayna moosa
verses.92: Qala ya haroonu ma manaAAaka ith raaytahum dalloo
verses.94: Qala ya bna omma la takhuth bilihyatee wala birasee innee khasheetu an taqoola farraqta bayna banee israeela walam tarqub qawlee
verses.96: Qala basurtu bima lam yabsuroo bihi faqabadtu qabdatan min athari alrrasooli fanabathtuha wakathalika sawwalat lee nafsee
verses.97: Qala faithhab fainna laka fee alhayati an taqoola la misasa wainna laka mawAAidan lan tukhlafahu waonthur ila ilahika allathee thalta AAalayhi AAakifan lanuharriqannahu thumma lanansifannahu fee alyammi nasfan
verses.98: Innama ilahukumu Allahu allathee la ilaha illa huwa wasiAAa kulla shayin AAilman
verses.99: Kathalika naqussu AAalayka min anbai ma qad sabaqa waqad ataynaka min ladunna thikran
verses.100: Man aAArada AAanhu fainnahu yahmilu yawma alqiyamati wizran
verses.101: Khalideena feehi wasaa lahum yawma alqiyamati himlan
verses.102: Yawma yunfakhu fee alssoori wanahshuru almujrimeena yawmaithin zurqan
verses.103: Yatakhafatoona baynahum in labithtum illa AAashran
verses.104: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloona ith yaqoolu amthaluhum tareeqatan in labithtum illa yawman
verses.105: Wayasaloonaka AAani aljibali faqul yansifuha rabbee nasfan
verses.107: La tara feeha AAiwajan wala amtan
verses.108: Yawmaithin yattabiAAoona alddaAAiya la AAiwaja lahu wakhashaAAati alaswatu lilrrahmani fala tasmaAAu illa hamsan
verses.109: Yawmaithin la tanfaAAu alshshafaAAatu illa man athina lahu alrrahmanu waradiya lahu qawlan
verses.110: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wama khalfahum wala yuheetoona bihi AAilman
verses.111: WaAAanati alwujoohu lilhayyi alqayyoomi waqad khaba man hamala thulman
verses.112: Waman yaAAmal mina alssalihati wahuwa muminun fala yakhafu thulman wala hadman
verses.113: Wakathalika anzalnahu quranan AAarabiyyan wasarrafna feehi mina alwaAAeedi laAAallahum yattaqoona aw yuhdithu lahum thikran
verses.114: FataAAala Allahu almaliku alhaqqu wala taAAjal bialqurani min qabli an yuqda ilayka wahyuhu waqul rabbi zidnee AAilman
verses.115: Walaqad AAahidna ila adama min qablu fanasiya walam najid lahu AAazman
verses.116: Waith qulna lilmalaikati osjudoo liadama fasajadoo illa ibleesa aba
verses.117: Faqulna ya adamu inna hatha AAaduwwun laka walizawjika fala yukhrijannakuma mina aljannati fatashqa
verses.118: Inna laka alla tajooAAa feeha wala taAAra
verses.119: Waannaka la tathmao feeha wala tadha
verses.120: Fawaswasa ilayhi alshshaytanu qala ya adamu hal adulluka AAala shajarati alkhuldi wamulkin la yabla
verses.121: Faakala minha fabadat lahuma sawatuhuma watafiqa yakhsifani AAalayhima min waraqi aljannati waAAasa adamu rabbahu faghawa
verses.122: Thumma ijtabahu rabbuhu fataba AAalayhi wahada
verses.123: Qala ihbita minha jameeAAan baAAdukum libaAAdin AAaduwwun faimma yatiyannakum minnee hudan famani ittabaAAa hudaya fala yadillu wala yashqa
verses.124: Waman aAArada AAan thikree fainna lahu maAAeeshatan dankan wanahshuruhu yawma alqiyamati aAAman
verses.125: Qala rabbi lima hashartanee aAAma waqad kuntu baseeran
verses.126: Qala kathalika atatka ayatuna fanaseetaha wakathalika alyawma tunsa
verses.127: Wakathalika najzee man asrafa walam yumin biayati rabbihi walaAAathabu alakhirati ashaddu waabqa
verses.128: Afalam yahdi lahum kam ahlakna qablahum mina alqurooni yamshoona fee masakinihim inna fee thalika laayatin liolee alnnuha
verses.129: Walawla kalimatun sabaqat min rabbika lakana lizaman waajalun musamman
verses.130: Faisbir AAala ma yaqooloona wasabbih bihamdi rabbika qabla tulooAAi alshshamsi waqabla ghuroobiha wamin anai allayli fasabbih waatrafa alnnahari laAAallaka tarda
verses.131: Wala tamuddanna AAaynayka ila ma mattaAAna bihi azwajan minhum zahrata alhayati alddunya linaftinahum feehi warizqu rabbika khayrun waabqa
verses.132: Wamur ahlaka bialssalati waistabir AAalayha la nasaluka rizqan nahnu narzuquka waalAAaqibatu lilttaqwa
verses.133: Waqaloo lawla yateena biayatin min rabbihi awalam tatihim bayyinatu ma fee alssuhufi aloola
verses.134: Walaw anna ahlaknahum biAAathabin min qablihi laqaloo rabbana lawla arsalta ilayna rasoolan fanattabiAAa ayatika min qabli an nathilla wanakhza
verses.135: Qul kullun mutarabbisun fatarabbasoo fasataAAlamoona man ashabu alssirati alssawiyyi wamani ihtada
